div.head: The Chargé in Belgium (Sussdorff) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
54. Department’s circular July 17, 2 p.m. In the absence of the Belgian Minister for Foreign Affairs, I discussed the substance of your statement contained in Radio Bulletin 164 with the Secretary General of the Foreign Office. He stated: (1)
that the principles set forth in the statement are almost integrally those which have guided and continue to guide the Belgian Government in its foreign policy; (2)
that most of these principles have been stated separately by high Belgian officials in public utterances; (3)
that the Belgian Government is prepared in general to cooperate in advancing the principles in question.
